ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the state belongs to */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator (e.g., GDP, employment, inflation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "publication_frequency" TEXT /* Publication frequency of the data source (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES annual_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Old value of the data */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value of the data */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_revisions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES annual_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES annual_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES annual_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was added */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES annual_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "viz_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "viz_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "viz_url" TEXT /* URL of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES annual_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "external_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "external_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the external data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES annual_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_links_external_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("external_source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("external_source_id")
)
